creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi Sergey,

Thanks for the report, you're right. Here's the diff required, as per
your suggested fix.

Ciao,
Sheldon.

Index: 310.locate
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/src/etc/periodic/weekly/310.locate,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -d -r1.2 310.locate
--- 310.locate	1997/11/01 15:00:40	1.2
+++ 310.locate	1999/03/28 16:35:08
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
 
     touch ${locdb}; chown nobody ${locdb}; chmod 644 ${locdb}
 
+    cd /
     echo /usr/libexec/locate.updatedb | nice -5 su -fm nobody
     chmod 444 ${locdb}
 fi
